items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario where a persona tries to share a template across businesses. However, there is no direct evidence provided that confirms the expected outcome of this scenario, nor is there any indication of how the system behaves in this context. The lack of concrete traces or snapshots to audit the coverage further contributes to the inconclusiveness of this validation.
